description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a gently curved backrest and seat, both upholstered in a smooth teal fabric. The backrest is broad and slightly reclined, providing ample support, while the seat is wide and comfortably padded. The armrests are integrated into the frame, curving outward in a continuous line that connects to the slender, metal legs. The legs are thin, cylindrical, and finished in a muted metallic tone, giving the piece a light and airy appearance. The upholstery is solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to its clean and contemporary look. The overall construction suggests a sturdy yet comfortable seating option suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern teal-upholstered chaise with a curved backrest, integrated armrests, and slender metal legs, offering a clean and contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's curved backrest, thick seat cushion, and the outward curve of the armrest and legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, broad backrest, and symmetrical armrests, emphasizing the inviting seating area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the chaise's profile, armrest curve, and seat depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full width and gentle curve of the backrest, as well as the continuous metal frame supporting the back.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is broad, gently curved, and moderately high, providing substantial support. It is a single, unsegmented piece with smooth upholstery and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has integrated armrests on both sides, formed by the continuous curve of the frame, positioned at a comfortable height.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and cylindrical, made of metal with a muted finish. They are simple and unadorned, contributing to the modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick seat cushion and an attached backrest cushion, both seamlessly integrated into the frame with no loose or layered cushions visible.
